metaDescription: AI/ML engineer at Icelandia ehf. Building production AI systems — chatbots, MCP servers, ML pipelines, and automation. Available for advisory, training, and implementation work.

hero.headline: I build production AI systems.
hero.subline: AI/ML engineer at Icelandia ehf. I ship chatbots, MCP servers, ML pipelines, and automation that runs in real life — not slides. Available for advisory, training, and implementation work.

home.featuredSubtitle: Recent production systems. Internal builds described at a level my employer is comfortable with.
home.servicesSubtitle: Three ways to work with me.
home.currentlyLead: What I'm working on right now.

projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: Production AI systems, research, and side projects. Anything marked Internal was built for Icelandia ehf and is described at a high level only.

services.title: Services
services.subtitle: I help companies use AI in ways that pay off — through audits, hands-on builds, and training.
services.footnote: Iceland-based. Comfortable working in Icelandic or English.

about.title: About
about.subtitle: AI/ML engineer at Icelandia ehf in Iceland. Background in cognitive science and psychology.

now.title: Now
now.body: AI Specialist at Icelandia ehf (formerly Reykjavik Excursions). Building production AI for tour operations, customer support, and revenue forecasting.

background.title: Background
background.body: I work across the AI stack — data, modeling, agents, deployment, and everything in between. My goal on every build is the same: ship something that runs in production and earns its keep.

aarhus.title: Aarhus University · 2022–2024
aarhus.body: MSc IT — Cognitive Science. Thesis: Age and Gender Bias within Icelandic ASR Systems.

ru.title: Reykjavík University · 2021–2022
ru.body: First year of a two-year Computer Science programme before being accepted into the Aarhus master's.

hi.title: University of Iceland · 2014–2019
hi.body: BSc Psychology. Thesis: Political Polarization in Icelandic Society.

icelandia.title: Icelandia ehf · AI Specialist · 2024–present
icelandia.body: Building the AI stack: chatbots, MCP servers, ML demand forecasting, email-to-booking automation, and analytics dashboards.

cyberpilot.title: CyberPilot · Programming & Data · 2022–2024
cyberpilot.body: Part-time during my MSc. Programming and data processing at a Danish cybersecurity company.

reykjavikurborg.title: Reykjavíkurborg · 2014–2022
reykjavikurborg.body: Manager, team leader, and frontline roles at residential units.

skills.title: Skills
skills.ai: AI / ML — RAG, LLMs, agents, MCP, fine-tuning, evaluation, prompt engineering
skills.stack: Stack — Azure (App Service, Functions, SQL, OpenAI), Pinecone, Anthropic, Cohere, Sanity, Netlify
skills.ml: ML libraries — PyTorch, Transformers, scikit-learn, CatBoost, XGBoost, Pandas

contactCta.title: Get in touch
contactCta.body: Best on email or phone. I read both.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: If you're thinking about an AI build, audit, or workshop — drop a line.
